name: Root Audit
description: Adds root directory hygiene capability to Rigby — surfaces misplaced files, recommends moves or deletions, and executes after confirmation.

files.description: New Rigby skill: audit IES root directory, classify misplaced files as Move/Delete/Unknown, execute after confirmation
Added Root Audit to Rigby's Task Portfolio under system block
New daily-review step 04: root audit — runs after step 03 as final shutdown housekeeping
Updated WORKFLOW COMPLETE to chain to step-04-root-audit instead of halting

changelog: New: Root Audit skill for Rigby (.claude/skills/rigby-root-audit/SKILL.md)
Updated: Rigby task portfolio — added Root Audit to system block
New: Daily review step 04 — root audit housekeeping runs after system update
Updated: Daily review step 03 — WORKFLOW COMPLETE chains to step-04-root-audit
training_prompts: When root audit surfaces misplaced files, present them grouped by action (Move, Delete, Unknown) in a table format.
Never execute moves or deletes without explicit confirmation from the executive.
If a file classification is ambiguous, classify as Unknown and flag for executive decision.
Always preserve known system files (.gitignore, CLAUDE.md, SYSTEM.md, README.md, dotfiles).
